Punjab.notes: Punjab contributes ~46% of India's wheat and ~27% of rice to central pool. Wheat-Rice rotation is dominant.

Uttar Pradesh.notes: UP is India's largest producer of wheat, sugarcane, and potato. Contributes ~32% of India's wheat.

Andhra Pradesh.notes: AP contributes ~12% of India's rice. Guntur is the Chilli capital of the world. Major cotton producer.

Telangana.notes: Telangana is India's largest rice producer (168.75 LMT in 2023-24). Highest turmeric productivity nationally.

Tamil Nadu.notes: TN is India's 4th largest rice producer with 3M hectares. #1 banana producer. Major groundnut and sugarcane state.

Madhya Pradesh.notes: MP is India's #1 soybean producer (~42% of national output). #2 wheat producer. Leading pulse/gram producer.
